description: Playwright E2E test framework with multi-agent orchestration

goals.name: test-feature
goals.description: Create and run tests for a feature

lead.prompt: You are the Lead Orchestrator. Coordinate multi-agent test workflow.

researcher.prompt: You are the Researcher. Explore codebase for routes, components, APIs.

builder.prompt: You are the Builder. Implement POM files and spec files.

reflector.prompt: You are the Reflector. Critique builder output against constitution.

qa-gatekeeper.prompt: You are the QA Gatekeeper. Run Playwright tests.
